reviews.comment:
Siempre muy concurrida para cargar combustible.
No la caracterizo por su limpieza, amabilidad o rapidez.
Son todos puntos a mejorar.
Si vas tarde, ni siquiera tiene posibilidad de limpiar vidrios...
Son muy cómodas las instalaciones para controlar neumáticos.

(Translated by Google)
Always very busy for fuel.
I don't characterize it for its cleanliness, friendliness, or speed.
These are all areas for improvement.
If you arrive late, they don't even have the option to clean the windows...
The facilities for checking tires are very convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNheC1qT2NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Por la zona donde se encuentra deberia ser 5 estrellas.
Deteriorado cada dia un poco mas .
Refleja mala gedtion y mal aspecto para la empresa .
Confiteria y baños idem anterior .

(Translated by Google)
Given its location, it should be a 5-star establishment.
It deteriorates a little more each day. It reflects poor management and gives the company a bad image. The confectionery and restrooms are in the same state as before.
